top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Maraton Franja BTC City's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Maraton Franja BTC City's paved Slovenian provincial and back-country roads rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
At mile 60 of 97, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
When someone attacks on paved Slovenian provincial and back-country roads, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Maraton Franja BTC City's paved Slovenian provincial and back-country roads forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 97 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Maraton Franja BTC City. Train it until it feels boring.
At Maraton Franja BTC City, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 4,281ft of climbing on paved Slovenian provincial and back-country roads does to your power file on race day.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved Slovenian provincial and back-country roads. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 97 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Varied gradients on paved Slovenian provincial and back-country roads demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Maraton Franja BTC City, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Maraton Franja BTC City’s 97 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, TT Threshold, and Durability to prepare you for 97 miles of paved slovenian provincial and back-country roads in Ljubljana, Slovenia.
